titles.text: Mega Man X in Sonic the Hedgehog 2

descriptions.text: Mega Man X in Sonic The Hedgehog 2 is a ROMhack/mod of Sonic The Hedgehog 2 which lets the player control Mega Man X instead of Sonic, with all of his signature attacks, like the charge beam, the wall jump and the dash, and X can also get the weapons from his enemies, like in his own games.
